mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (admin_id, reservation_at, content, status) VALUES (#{adminId}, #{reservationAt}, #{content}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, admin_id, reservation_at, content, status, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation WHERE admin_id = #{adminId} ORDER BY reservation_at
SELECT id, admin_id, reservation_at, content, status, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation WHERE DATE(reservation_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY reservation_at
